data.text: ONE OF TWO FELYSIAN WORLDS IN FRANCE IV. THIS WORLD IS FULL OF
ROCKY MOUNTAIN RANGES AND VARIOUS CLIFFS AND DEPRESSION.
DISCOVERY NEWS:ON THE PREVIOUS ARTICLE OF DISCOVERY IN THE MENDOZA
REMOTE NEWS, ANOTHER POINT OF INTEREST FOUND! AT 266:86, THERE'S A
DEEP VALLEY WHICH IS A *VERY* NICE VIEW! PLEASE STAY TUNED!
